companies.name: OpenAI
companies.notes: Transitioned from non-profit to capped-profit (2019). GPT-OSS open-source initiative launched. $840B valuation as of Feb 2026.

companies.name: Anthropic
companies.notes: Founded by ex-OpenAI researchers. Safety-focused. Claude Code launched 2025-03. $380B valuation as of Feb 2026.

companies.name: Google DeepMind
companies.notes: DeepMind (2010) merged with Google Brain (2011) in April 2023. Also Mountain View HQ. Subsidiary of Alphabet.

companies.name: Meta (FAIR)
companies.notes: FAIR (Facebook AI Research) founded 2013 by Yann LeCun. Llama 4 Scout/Maverick latest. Open-weight strategy supports core advertising business.

companies.name: xAI
companies.notes: Merged with SpaceX Feb 2026. Colossus supercomputer (100k+ H100s). Grok integrated into X/Twitter.

companies.name: Microsoft Research
companies.notes: Division of Microsoft. Phi series small language models. Separate from OpenAI partnership.

companies.name: Apple
companies.notes: On-device focused. Apple Intelligence integrated across iOS/macOS. OpenAI partnership for Siri integration.

companies.name: Amazon (AWS)
companies.notes: Bedrock-native models. Up to $4B invested in Anthropic. Custom AI chips (Trainium, Inferentia).

companies.name: NVIDIA
companies.notes: Dominant AI chip supplier. Nemotron built on Llama base with custom training. CUDA ecosystem moat.

companies.name: Databricks
companies.notes: Acquired Mosaic ML (2023, $1.3B). DBRX open-weight model. Data lakehouse platform.

companies.name: Together AI
companies.notes: Open-source model training and inference platform. $3.3B valuation.

companies.name: Runway
companies.notes: Video generation pioneer. $5.3B valuation.

companies.name: ServiceNow
companies.notes: Enterprise-focused. Public company (NYSE: NOW).

companies.name: Cerebras
companies.notes: Wafer-Scale Engine chips. $8.1B valuation. Fastest inference for large models.

companies.name: SambaNova
companies.notes: Reconfigurable Dataflow Unit (RDU) architecture. In talks with Intel.

companies.name: Twelve Labs
companies.notes: Multimodal video understanding models.

companies.name: EleutherAI
companies.notes: Community-led, distributed research collective. Non-profit. Pioneered open-source LLM research.

companies.name: Allen AI (AI2)
companies.notes: Fully open (data + weights + code). Non-profit research institute founded by Paul Allen.

companies.name: Inflection AI
companies.notes: Microsoft hired CEO (Suleyman) and most of team in Mar 2024. Company reformed with remaining team. Pi chatbot.

companies.name: Cohere
companies.notes: Toronto HQ. Aidan Gomez is Transformer paper co-author. Enterprise-focused. $7B valuation.

companies.name: Mistral AI
companies.notes: Founders from Meta FAIR and Google DeepMind. Europe's leading AI lab. Mixture-of-experts pioneer.

companies.name: Aleph Alpha
companies.notes: German sovereign AI play. Enterprise and government focused. €500M+ funding.

companies.name: Black Forest Labs
companies.notes: Founded by Stable Diffusion creators. FLUX image generation. $3.25B valuation.

companies.name: DeepL
companies.notes: Neural machine translation. Preparing IPO 2026. Profitable.

companies.name: Stability AI
companies.notes: Open-source image generation pioneer. Emad Mostaque left as CEO Mar 2024. Restructured under new leadership.

companies.name: Wayve
companies.notes: Autonomous driving foundation models. End-to-end learned driving. $8.6B valuation.

companies.name: ElevenLabs
companies.notes: Voice synthesis and cloning. Founded in Poland, HQ London. $11B valuation.

companies.name: Synthesia
companies.notes: AI avatar video generation. Enterprise training and communications.

companies.name: Helsing
companies.notes: Defense and security AI. Germany, France, UK operations. $12B valuation.

companies.name: Silo AI
companies.notes: Acquired by AMD. Nordic language models. Used LUMI supercomputer (AMD-based).

companies.name: AI21 Labs
companies.notes: Jamba architecture (SSM-Transformer hybrid). $1.4B+ valuation.

companies.name: Alibaba (Qwen Lab)
companies.notes: $50.6B AI investment over 3 years. Qwen series open-source. China's most prolific open-source LLM contributor.

companies.name: Baidu
companies.notes: China's largest search engine. ERNIE Bot consumer chatbot. Kunlun custom AI chips.

companies.name: Tencent
companies.notes: WeChat ecosystem. Hunyuan integrated into Tencent products.

companies.name: ByteDance (Seed Lab)
companies.notes: TikTok/Douyin parent. Seed Lab is internal AI research division. Doubao consumer chatbot.

companies.name: Huawei
companies.notes: Vertical integration: custom Ascend AI chips + Pangu models. Circumvents US chip export restrictions.

companies.name: DeepSeek
companies.notes: Backed by High-Flyer quantitative hedge fund. DeepSeek-R1 open-sourced (MIT license) Jan 2025. Shocked industry with efficiency claims.

companies.name: Moonshot AI
companies.notes: Kimi chatbot popular in China. Long-context specialist. $4.3B valuation.

companies.name: Zhipu AI
companies.notes: Tsinghua University spinoff. Considering IPO.

companies.name: SenseTime
companies.notes: Hong Kong listed. Computer vision origins. SenseNova LLM platform.

companies.name: MiniMax
companies.notes: Multimodal models including speech. Confidential HK IPO filing.

companies.name: Baichuan
companies.notes: Founded by ex-Sogou CEO Wang Xiaochuan. $693M Series A.

companies.name: StepFun
companies.notes: Multimodal VLM (Vision-Language Models). Open-weight releases.

companies.name: 01.AI (Yi)
companies.notes: Founded by Kai-Fu Lee (ex-Google China, Sinovation Ventures). Open-weight Yi models.

companies.name: Preferred Networks
companies.notes: Japan's largest AI lab. Custom MN-Core AI chips. Toyota partnership.

companies.name: Sakana AI
companies.notes: Llion Jones is Transformer paper co-author. David Ha ex-Google Brain. Evolutionary model merging approach.

companies.name: Naver
companies.notes: Korea's largest search engine. HyperCLOVA X for Korean language.

companies.name: Samsung Research
companies.notes: Samsung Electronics division. Gauss on-device models for Galaxy devices.

companies.name: Kakao Brain
companies.notes: Kakao subsidiary. Korean language focus. Open-source KoGPT.

companies.name: Upstage
companies.notes: SOLAR open-weight models. Document AI specialization.

companies.name: Technology Innovation Institute
companies.notes: Abu Dhabi government-backed. Falcon models open-sourced. Part of ATRC.

companies.name: G42
companies.notes: Arabic language AI. Microsoft $1.5B investment and partnership. Abu Dhabi based.

companies.name: Sarvam AI
companies.notes: Indian language AI. Open-source focus. Bangalore based.

companies.name: Krutrim (Ola)
companies.notes: Founded by Ola CEO. India's first AI unicorn. Multilingual focus.

companies.name: Yandex
companies.notes: Russia's largest search engine. YandexGPT integrated into Yandex products.

companies.name: Sber (SberBank)
companies.notes: Russia's largest bank turned tech company. GigaChat consumer chatbot.

companies.name: Mosaic ML
companies.notes: Acquired by Databricks for $1.3B in June 2023. MPT models continue under Databricks.

companies.name: Character.ai
companies.notes: Noam Shazeer is Transformer paper co-author. Google talent acquisition 2024. Custom chat models.

companies.name: Adept AI
companies.notes: Action model (ACT-1) for computer use. Amazon talent acquisition 2024.

companies.name: BigScience
companies.notes: Community research project coordinated by Hugging Face. BLOOM 176B multilingual model. Project completed.

companies.name: Cursor (Anysphere)
companies.notes: AI-native IDE. Proved AI code editor is a category. Uses Claude and GPT models.

companies.name: Windsurf (Codeium)
companies.notes: Rebranded from Codeium to Windsurf. AI-native IDE with agentic capabilities.

companies.name: Replit
companies.notes: Browser-based IDE + deployment. Also trains own code completion models.

companies.name: Perplexity
companies.notes: AI-native search engine. Answer engine, not link engine. $9B valuation.

companies.name: You.com
companies.notes: AI search engine. Founded by Richard Socher (former Salesforce Chief Scientist, NLP pioneer).

companies.name: Poe (Quora)
companies.notes: Multi-model chat platform by Quora. Adam D'Angelo is OpenAI board member. Aggregator model.

companies.name: Jasper
companies.notes: AI content creation platform. Enterprise marketing focus. $1.5B valuation at peak.

companies.name: Copy.ai
companies.notes: AI copywriting and workflows platform. Pivoted from content to GTM AI workflows.

companies.name: Writer
companies.notes: Enterprise AI writing platform. Also trains own Palmyra models. $1.9B valuation.

companies.name: Scale AI
companies.notes: Data labeling and AI infrastructure. Alexandr Wang youngest self-made billionaire. US defense contracts. $13.8B valuation.

companies.name: Labelbox
companies.notes: Data labeling and annotation platform. Competes with Scale AI.

companies.name: LangChain
companies.notes: LLM orchestration framework. LangSmith (observability) and LangGraph (agents) products.

companies.name: LlamaIndex
companies.notes: Data framework for LLM apps. RAG specialist. LlamaCloud managed service.

companies.name: CrewAI
companies.notes: Multi-agent orchestration framework. Role-based agent collaboration.

companies.name: Vercel
companies.notes: Frontend deployment platform. Vercel AI SDK for building AI apps. Next.js creator. v0 AI code generation.

companies.name: Supabase
companies.notes: Open-source Firebase alternative. pgvector for AI embeddings. Edge Functions for AI workloads.

companies.name: Netlify
companies.notes: Web deployment platform. AI-assisted deployment and edge functions.

companies.name: GoHighLevel (GHL)
companies.notes: All-in-one CRM, marketing automation, AI voice. White-label SaaS platform. What Local Biz uses.
